Equity Research Analyst Note

Subject: Preview of Upcoming Earnings Report for Quantum Dynamics Ltd.

Dear Investors,

As we approach the earnings release for Quantum Dynamics Ltd. (UEN: 202312345G), we would like to provide an update on what to expect. Our analysis indicates that the company is likely to report a modest growth in revenue, though certain project plans have faced delays, impacting the overall project status negatively.

Dr. Alan Tan, CFO of Quantum Dynamics Ltd., has been pivotal in navigating these challenges. We have received confirmation that the earnings call is scheduled for November 15, 2023, at 10:00 AM SGT. For any inquiries, feel free to reach our analyst team at +65 6123 4567 or via email at analyst.team@quantum.sg.

Please note that Ms. Jennifer Lim, our lead analyst on this case, has identified key metrics to watch, including a projected EBITDA of SGD 1.5 million. Access further details through our secure portal, https://researchportal.sg/user/S1234567A, using your account credentials.

For those who wish to discuss the Strategic Partnership Agreement (the "SPA") between Quantum Dynamics and their new joint venture, further references to the SPA can be found in our detailed report.

We look forward to discussing these insights further post-release. Thank you for your continued trust in our analysis.

Best regards,

The Equity Research Team  
Quantum Dynamics Ltd.  
Contact: +65 6123 4567  
research@quantum.sg
